competitionRules.notes: 世界杯阵容页规则配置；如 FIFA 官方竞赛规程更新，可按赛季覆盖。

attendanceSource: FootyStats · 参加人数最多的比赛

qualifiers.espnText: Lineups are announced and players are warming up.

events.description: 首发阵容公布，球员热身。

qualifiers.espnText: First Half begins.
Attempt missed. Kai Havertz (Germany) left footed shot from the centre of the box is too high. Assisted by Florian Wirtz.

events.description: 哈弗茨射门偏出。 维尔茨参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Offside, Côte d'Ivoire. Franck Kessie is caught offside.
Attempt saved. Kai Havertz (Germany) header from the centre of the box is saved in the bottom left corner by Yahia Fofana (Côte d'Ivoire). Assisted by Joshua Kimmich with a cross.

events.description: 哈弗茨射正。 基米希参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Jamal Musiala (Germany) wins a free kick in the attacking half.
Attempt blocked. Wilfried Singo (Côte d'Ivoire) left footed shot from the centre of the box is blocked.

events.description: 威尔弗里德·辛戈射门被封堵。

qualifiers.espnText: Delay in match because of an injury Nico Schlotterbeck (Germany).
Delay over. They are ready to continue.
Attempt missed. Jamal Musiala (Germany) right footed shot from outside the box misses to the right. Assisted by Aleksandar Pavlovic.

events.description: 穆西亚拉射门偏出。 亚历山大·巴甫洛维奇参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Attempt blocked. Felix Nmecha (Germany) right footed shot from outside the box is blocked. Assisted by Nico Schlotterbeck.

events.description: 菲利克斯·恩梅查射门被封堵。 尼科·施洛特贝克参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Corner, Germany. Conceded by Ibrahim Sangaré.
Foul by Aleksandar Pavlovic (Germany).

events.description: 亚历山大·巴甫洛维奇犯规。

qualifiers.espnText: Delay in match because of an injury Yahia Fofana (Côte d'Ivoire).
Delay over. They are ready to continue.
Delay in match for a drinks break.
Delay over. They are ready to continue.
Attempt blocked. Amad Diallo (Côte d'Ivoire) left footed shot from very close range is blocked. Assisted by Yan Diomande with a cross.

events.description: 阿马德·迪亚洛射门被封堵。 扬·迪奥曼德参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Handball by Christ Inao Oulaï (Côte d'Ivoire).
Attempt saved. Ange-Yoan Bonny (Côte d'Ivoire) right footed shot from outside the box is saved in the top right corner by Manuel Neuer (Germany). Assisted by Yan Diomande.

events.description: 安吉·尤安·邦尼射正。 扬·迪奥曼德参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Odilon Kossounou (Côte d'Ivoire) wins a free kick in the defensive half.
Foul by Franck Kessie (Côte d'Ivoire).
Attempt blocked. Florian Wirtz (Germany) right footed shot from the centre of the box is blocked. Assisted by Jamal Musiala.

events.description: 维尔茨射门被封堵。 穆西亚拉参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Corner, Germany. Conceded by Ghislain Konan.
Attempt blocked. Jamal Musiala (Germany) left footed shot from outside the box is blocked.
Corner, Germany. Conceded by Emmanuel Agbadou.
Attempt blocked. Felix Nmecha (Germany) right footed shot from outside the box is blocked.

events.description: 菲利克斯·恩梅查射门被封堵。

qualifiers.espnText: Corner, Côte d'Ivoire. Conceded by Nico Schlotterbeck.
Fourth official has announced 7 minutes of added time.

events.description: 第四官员示意补时7分钟。

qualifiers.espnText: Attempt saved. Florian Wirtz (Germany) right footed shot from the centre of the box is saved in the centre of the goal by Yahia Fofana (Côte d'Ivoire). Assisted by Felix Nmecha.

events.description: 维尔茨射正。 菲利克斯·恩梅查参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: First Half ends, Germany 0, Côte d'Ivoire 1.

events.description: 安东尼奥·吕迪格 登场，尼科·施洛特贝克 离场

qualifiers.espnText: Second Half begins Germany 0, Côte d'Ivoire 1.
Attempt blocked. Ghislain Konan (Côte d'Ivoire) left footed shot from outside the box is blocked. Assisted by Christ Inao Oulaï.

events.description: 吉斯兰·科南射门被封堵。 基督·伊瑙·欧莱参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Corner, Germany. Conceded by Ibrahim Sangaré.
Attempt blocked. Franck Kessie (Côte d'Ivoire) right footed shot from the centre of the box is blocked. Assisted by Amad Diallo.

events.description: 弗兰克·凯西射门被封堵。 阿马德·迪亚洛参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Attempt missed. Christ Inao Oulaï (Côte d'Ivoire) right footed shot from the centre of the box is too high. Assisted by Amad Diallo following a fast break.
qualifiers.espnShortText: Christ Inao Oulaï Shot Off Targe

events.description: 基督·伊瑙·欧莱射门偏出。 阿马德·迪亚洛参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Corner, Côte d'Ivoire. Conceded by Felix Nmecha.
Aleksandar Pavlovic (Germany) wins a free kick in the defensive half.
Attempt missed. Yan Diomande (Côte d'Ivoire) right footed shot from the centre of the box misses to the left.
Attempt missed. Antonio Rüdiger (Germany) right footed shot from more than 35 yards is high and wide to the left. Assisted by Jonathan Tah.

events.description: 安东尼奥·吕迪格射门偏出。 乔纳森·塔参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Jonathan Tah (Germany) wins a free kick in the defensive half.
Corner, Germany. Conceded by Amad Diallo.
Corner, Germany. Conceded by Amad Diallo.

events.description: 翁达夫 登场，穆西亚拉 离场
纳迪姆·阿米里 登场，亚历山大·巴甫洛维奇 离场
杰米·卢威林 登场，萨内 离场

qualifiers.espnText: Attempt missed. Jamie Leweling (Germany) left footed shot from outside the box is high and wide to the left. Assisted by Deniz Undav.

events.description: 杰米·卢威林射门偏出。 翁达夫参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Corner, Germany. Conceded by Wilfried Singo.
Attempt missed. Kai Havertz (Germany) header from the right side of the six yard box is close, but misses to the right. Assisted by Joshua Kimmich with a cross following a corner.

events.description: 哈弗茨射门偏出。 基米希参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Corner, Germany. Conceded by Ibrahim Sangaré.
Yahia Fofana (Côte d'Ivoire) wins a free kick in the defensive half.
Foul by Deniz Undav (Germany).

qualifiers.espnText: Foul by Florian Wirtz (Germany).
Corner, Côte d'Ivoire. Conceded by Jonathan Tah.
Attempt blocked. Seko Fofana (Côte d'Ivoire) right footed shot from outside the box is blocked. Assisted by Simon Adingra.

events.description: 塞科·福法纳射门被封堵。 西蒙·阿丁格拉参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Attempt saved. Deniz Undav (Germany) right footed shot from outside the box is saved in the top right corner by Yahia Fofana (Côte d'Ivoire). Assisted by Joshua Kimmich with a headed pass.

events.description: 翁达夫射正。 基米希参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Felix Nmecha (Germany) wins a free kick in the defensive half.
Attempt saved. Nathaniel Brown (Germany) left footed shot from the left side of the box is saved in the centre of the goal by Yahia Fofana (Côte d'Ivoire). Assisted by Florian Wirtz.

events.description: 纳撒尼尔·布朗射正。 维尔茨参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Fourth official has announced 6 minutes of added time.
